title: zieria granulata
intro: Zieria granulata, also known as the Dorrigo pepperbush, is a shrub native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Zieria granulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat respiratory infections. Zieria granulata can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
